title: b8571
description: common/json-schema: fix: handle non-capturing groups (?:...) in JSON schema pattern converter ( #21124 ) The regex-to-grammar converter in _visit_pattern() crashes with SIGSEGV when a JSON schema "pattern" field contains a non-capturing group (?:...). Root cause: when the parser sees '(' followed by '?', it pushes a warning but does not advance past '?:'. The recursive transform() call then interprets '?' as a quantifier and calls seq.back() on an empty vector, causing undefined behavior. This c
